tool.title: UQ Simple Curve (rappture2web)
tool.about:
Demonstrates Uncertainty Quantification on a simple curve.
When UQ is enabled, number inputs can be set to uniform or gaussian distributions. The tool runs multiple times at Smolyak collocation points and PUQ fits a response surface, producing PDF and probability band outputs.

about.label: Amplitude
about.description: Amplitude scaling factor for the output curve.

about.label: Frequency
about.description: Frequency of the cosine wave in Hz.

about.label: Number of points
about.description: Number of data points in the output curve.

about.label: Peak Value
about.description: Maximum value of the output curve.
